conversation.content: My package says delivered but I never received it. What should I do?

reference_output: I'm sorry to hear that. First, check around your porch, mailbox, and with neighbors or your building manager — carriers sometimes mark packages delivered a few hours early. If it hasn't turned up within 24 hours, reply here with your order number and I'll open a trace with the carrier and arrange a replacement or refund.

conversation.content: How do I reset my password?

reference_output: Click 'Forgot password' on the sign-in page, enter the email on your account, and follow the link we send you. The link expires after 30 minutes. If you don't see the email, check spam or search for 'account security'.

conversation.content: Can I change the shipping address on order #58213? It hasn't shipped yet.

reference_output: Yes — since the order hasn't shipped, I can update it. Please confirm the full new address including postal code, and I'll change it right away. Once it ships, the address is locked, so it's good you caught it early.

conversation.content: Why was I charged twice this month?

reference_output: One of the two charges is likely a temporary authorization hold that will drop off within 3-5 business days. Could you tell me the two amounts and dates? If both have actually posted, I'll refund the duplicate immediately and email you a confirmation.

conversation.content: Do you ship to Canada?

reference_output: Yes, we ship to Canada. Standard shipping takes 7-10 business days and costs $12.99; orders over $75 ship free. Note that customs duties may apply and are collected at checkout so there are no surprises at delivery.

conversation.content: My discount code SAVE20 isn't working at checkout.

reference_output: Sorry about that! SAVE20 applies to orders of $50 or more and excludes gift cards. If your cart qualifies and it still fails, try removing and re-adding the code without spaces. Still stuck? Share a screenshot of the error and I'll apply the discount manually.

conversation.content: I want to cancel my subscription before the next billing date.

reference_output: You can cancel anytime under Settings > Billing > Cancel plan. Your next billing date is shown at the top of that page; cancel before then and you won't be charged again, and you keep access until the period ends. Want me to cancel it for you now?

conversation.content: The blender I bought stopped working after two weeks.

reference_output: That's frustrating — a two-week-old blender should absolutely still work. It's covered by our 1-year warranty. I can send a prepaid return label and ship a replacement as soon as the carrier scans the return, or issue a full refund instead. Which would you prefer?

conversation.content: How long do refunds take to appear on my card?

reference_output: Once we process a refund you'll get a confirmation email immediately, and the money typically appears on your statement within 5-10 business days depending on your bank. If it's been longer than 10 business days, contact us with the refund ID from that email.

conversation.content: Can I return an item I bought on sale?

reference_output: Yes — sale items follow the same 30-day return policy as full-price items, as long as they're unused and in the original packaging. Final-sale items (marked on the product page) are the only exception. Would you like me to start a return for you?

conversation.content: My tracking number hasn't updated in 4 days. Is my order lost?

reference_output: Not necessarily — carriers sometimes miss scans for several days, especially between regional hubs. That said, 4 days is worth checking. I've asked the carrier for a status update; you'll hear back within 48 hours. If there's no movement by then, we'll send a replacement at no cost.

conversation.content: Is the extended warranty worth it for the espresso machine?

reference_output: It depends on how you use it. The machine already has a 1-year warranty covering defects. The extended plan ($29 for 2 extra years) also covers pump and heating-element failures, which are the most common repairs after year one and cost $80-120 out of pocket. Heavy daily users tend to benefit; occasional users often don't.

conversation.content: How do I update the payment card on file?

reference_output: Go to Account > Payment methods, click 'Add card', enter the new details, then set it as default. You can delete the old card afterwards. Any active subscriptions switch to the default card automatically at the next billing cycle.

conversation.content: I received the wrong size shoes. I ordered 10 and got 8.

reference_output: I apologize for the mix-up. I've set up a free exchange: you'll get a prepaid label by email, and the size 10 pair ships as soon as the carrier scans your return — you don't have to wait for it to arrive back. Anything else I can fix while we're at it?

conversation.content: What's your price match policy?

reference_output: We match prices from major retailers on identical, in-stock items within 14 days of purchase. Send us a link to the competitor's listing and your order number, and we'll refund the difference to your original payment method within 2 business days. Marketplace sellers and clearance prices are excluded.

conversation.content: The app keeps crashing when I open the orders tab.

reference_output: Sorry about that. Try these in order: 1) update the app to the latest version, 2) log out and back in, 3) clear the app cache (Settings > Storage). This is a known issue in v3.2 that's fixed in v3.3. If it persists after updating, tell me your device model and OS version and I'll escalate to engineering.

conversation.content: Where is my invoice for last month?

reference_output: You can download it under Account > Billing > Invoice history — look for the entry dated the 1st of last month. Invoices are also emailed to your account address each cycle. Want me to resend it to a different email?

conversation.content: Do you offer gift wrapping?

reference_output: Yes, gift wrapping is available for $4.99 per item at checkout — look for the 'Add gift options' box under each product in your cart. You can include a free personalized note as well.

conversation.content: Can I pick up my order in store instead of shipping?

reference_output: Yes, choose 'Store pickup' at checkout if a nearby location has the item in stock. Most pickup orders are ready within 2 hours and we hold them for 5 days. Bring a photo ID matching the order name.

conversation.content: How do I redeem a gift card?

reference_output: Enter the 16-digit code from the back of the card in the 'Gift card' field at checkout. The balance applies before your payment card is charged. You can check the remaining balance anytime under Account > Gift cards.

conversation.content: My order arrived damaged. The box was crushed and the mug inside is chipped.

reference_output: I'm sorry the mug arrived damaged. I can send a replacement or issue a refund — no need to return the damaged one. Could you upload a photo of the damage so I can file the carrier claim?

conversation.content: Is there a student discount?

reference_output: Yes, students get 15% off after verifying enrollment through our verification partner — the link is at the bottom of the pricing page. Verification takes a few minutes and the discount lasts 12 months before it needs renewal.

conversation.content: Why is my account locked?

reference_output: Accounts lock automatically after several failed sign-in attempts as a security measure. Use 'Forgot password' to reset and unlock, or wait 30 minutes and try again. If you didn't attempt those sign-ins, reset your password right away.

conversation.content: Can I get an itemized receipt for my company expense report?

reference_output: Sure — itemized receipts are available under Billing > Invoice history; click 'Download PDF' next to any charge. The PDF includes line items, tax, and our company details, which most expense systems accept.

conversation.content: The headphones I ordered are missing the charging cable.

reference_output: Sorry about that — the cable should be inside the small compartment under the foam insert, so it's worth a quick check there. If it's genuinely missing, I'll ship one out free of charge. Can you confirm your order number?

conversation.content: How do I change my email address on the account?

reference_output: Go to Settings > Profile, click 'Edit' next to your email, and enter the new one. We'll send a confirmation link to the new address; the change takes effect once you click it.

conversation.content: Do you restock sold-out items?

reference_output: Most core items restock within 2-4 weeks. Click 'Notify me' on the product page and we'll email you as soon as it's back. Seasonal and limited-edition items usually don't return.

conversation.content: What payment methods do you accept?

reference_output: We accept Visa, Mastercard, Amex, PayPal, Apple Pay, and Google Pay. Gift cards can be combined with any of these at checkout.

conversation.content: I was charged for a subscription I cancelled last month.

reference_output: That shouldn't happen if the cancellation completed before the billing date. Please share the email on the account and the charge date, and I'll check the cancellation timestamp and refund the charge if it went through after you cancelled.

conversation.content: Can you tell me when my order will arrive?

reference_output: Your tracking page has the latest estimate — orders usually arrive within 3-5 business days of shipping. If you give me your order number I can check the exact status for you.

conversation.content: How do I return an item?

reference_output: Go to Orders, select the item, and click 'Return'. You'll get a prepaid label to print. Refunds are issued when the warehouse receives the item.

conversation.content: My promo email said 30% off but checkout shows 15%.

reference_output: Some promotions apply different rates by category — the 30% usually covers clothing while accessories are 15%. Check the fine print in the email footer. If your items should qualify for 30%, reply with your cart contents and we'll look into it.

conversation.content: The website won't let me log in with the correct password.

reference_output: Try clearing your browser cookies or using a private window. If that doesn't work, reset your password. It might also be a caps-lock issue.

conversation.content: Can I transfer my subscription to a different email account?

reference_output: Subscriptions are tied to the account. You'd generally need to change the email on the existing account rather than transfer it. Contact billing support if you need something more complex.

conversation.content: Why does shipping cost more to my area?

reference_output: Shipping rates are set by the carriers based on distance and zone. Remote areas often cost more. You could try selecting a slower shipping speed to reduce the cost.

conversation.content: I need to change the color of the jacket in my order.

reference_output: Order changes depend on whether it has shipped. Check your order status page. If it still says processing, there may be an edit option; otherwise you would return and reorder.

conversation.content: Does the laptop come with a charger included?

reference_output: Most of our laptops include a charger in the box. Check the 'What's included' section on the product page for that specific model to be sure.

conversation.content: How do I contact a human agent?

reference_output: There should be a contact option somewhere in the help section of the site. Live chat is usually available during business hours.

conversation.content: My loyalty points disappeared after the site update.

reference_output: Points sometimes take a while to show up after system changes. Try logging out and back in. If they're still missing you should reach out to support.

conversation.content: Is this product compatible with EU power outlets?

reference_output: Many of our electronics support 100-240V but you may need a plug adapter. Check the specifications on the box or product page.

conversation.content: Can you expedite my order? I need it by Friday.

reference_output: Once an order is placed the shipping speed usually can't be changed. You could try cancelling and reordering with express shipping if it hasn't shipped yet.

conversation.content: What is your return policy?

reference_output: We have a return policy that covers most items. You can find the details on our returns page.

conversation.content: My order #99120 is three weeks late. I want answers.

reference_output: Sorry for the delay. Shipping times can vary due to many factors. Please continue to monitor your tracking page for updates.

conversation.content: The size chart says medium but the shirt fits like a small. Can I exchange it?

reference_output: Sizing can differ between brands. Many customers find it helpful to read reviews before ordering. You may be able to exchange it depending on the policy.

conversation.content: I was double-billed and my bank flagged the charge. Fix this.

reference_output: Billing issues are handled by our billing department. Please contact them through the appropriate channel for assistance with charges.

conversation.content: How do I delete my account and all my data?

reference_output: Account deletion is possible in some cases. There may be an option in your settings, or you might need to contact support about it.

conversation.content: Do you have this dress in size 14?

reference_output: Our inventory changes frequently, so availability varies. Checking the website is the best way to see what's in stock.

conversation.content: My package was stolen from my doorstep. What are my options?

reference_output: Package theft is unfortunate and increasingly common. Consider installing a camera or using a delivery locker in the future.

conversation.content: Why can't I apply two promo codes to one order?

reference_output: Thank you for contacting us. We value your feedback and are always working to improve the shopping experience for our customers.

conversation.content: The vacuum I bought is making a loud grinding noise. Is it dangerous?

reference_output: Vacuums contain motors that spin at high speeds. Our product line features many models with different suction capabilities and attachments for every home.

conversation.content: I need to update my delivery instructions for an order arriving today.

reference_output: Great news — your order is arriving today! We hope you enjoy your purchase and would love it if you left us a review.
